items.title: It's Okay to Not Be Okay

episodes.name: The Boy Who Fed On Nightmares
episodes.overview: Moon Gang-tae has a striking run-in with his brother's favorite author, Ko Mun-yeong, when she comes to his hospital to read to the children.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/8d3jbh04hz9e/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e01-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Lady in Red Shoes
episodes.overview: Mun-yeong invites Moon Sang-tae to a book signing event that ends with a nasty commotion. Gang-tae hears about a job opening in his hometown.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/88mz6w3x9sni/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e02-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Sleeping Witch
episodes.overview: Having followed Gang-tae, Mun-yeong begins teaching literature classes at his new hospital. Chaos breaks out when a VIP patient runs away.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dq3ubty5efyo/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e03-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Zombie Kid
episodes.overview: The VIP patient's incident triggers childhood memories for Gang-tae, who remains an emotional puzzle to Mun-yeong. Lee Sang-in arrives in town.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/y14p5t36l2vm/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e04-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Rapunzel and The Cursed Castle
episodes.overview: With nowhere else to take Mun-yeong, Gang-tae brings her back to his place. Discovering her there surprises everyone, most of all Nam Ju-ri.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/uyma5ijup61s/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e05-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Bluebeard's Secret
episodes.overview: When Mun-yeong offers an opportunity to Sang-tae, Gang-tae is forced to bend to their will. A patient at the hospital rattles Mun-yeong.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/sz8a7oztmxfs/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e06-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Cheerful Dog
episodes.overview: Gang-tae takes a day off from work to spend time with Mun-yeong, who seems to need a distraction. While drinking alone, Ju-ri encounters Sang-in.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/769umawq4dz3/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e07-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Beauty and The Beast
episodes.overview: Seeing Mun-yeong with something that belongs to him upsets Sang-tae. When a belligerent visitor shows up at the hospital, Gang-tae snaps.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/wriuxkgppy6g/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e08-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: King Donkey Ears
episodes.overview: Gang-tae and Mun-yeong decide to go on a day trip together. During their mountain getaway, an unforeseen situation crops up.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2jy6m674cowq/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e09-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Girl Who Cried Wolf
episodes.overview: Refusing to go home, Sang-tae coops himself up in a room. Gang-tae wrestles with the demons of his past and the constraints of his present.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yhd5nkhl0m42/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e10-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Ugly Duckling
episodes.overview: An escaped patient shows up at the mansion. Mun-yeong makes an effort to change Sang-tae's mind about allowing her a place in the brothers' lives.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/s2v85l77lnm6/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e11-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cj6is96l9y2b/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e12-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/z32gjbhaiz3y/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e13-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Hand, the Monkfish
episodes.overview: The identity of the vandal who ruined Sang-tae's mural sends everyone into a state of shock. Mun-yeong struggles to process a devastating truth.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/na5okpxkltnw/its-okay-to-not-be-okay-s01e14-720p-web-dl-hin-fil-x265-esub-katdrama" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>
